name: Chicken with Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup milk, up to 1 cup (1% lowfat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and place it in a large pot. Cover with water.
2. Add sliced carrots, celery, chopped onion, crumbled thyme, rosemary, 2 teaspoons salt, and half a teaspoon of freshly ground black pepper.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer.
4. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, 1 teaspoon salt, and minced parsley.
5. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
6. Gradually add milk, stirring briefly with a fork until the dough holds together.
7. When the chicken has simmered for 20 minutes, drop spoonfuls of the dough onto the bubbling broth.
8. Cover and steam for 20 minutes without lifting the cover.
